'''鈭歨-t-sh-r''' ('''kahatsheroko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:electrotin|electrotin]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| h-t-sh-r
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:electrotin|electrotin]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歨-t-sh-r
|-
! Lemma
| kahatsheroko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thihatsheroko|thihatsheroko]] || [[word:jihatsheroko|jihatsheroko]] || [[word:shihatsheroko|shihatsheroko]] || [[word:kihatsheroko|kihatsheroko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuhatsheroko|thuthuhatsheroko]] || [[word:jujuhatsheroko|jujuhatsheroko]] || [[word:shushuhatsheroko|shushuhatsheroko]] || [[word:kukuhatsheroko|kukuhatsheroko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuhatsheroko|thuhatsheroko]] || [[word:juhatsheroko|juhatsheroko]] || [[word:shuhatsheroko|shuhatsheroko]] || [[word:kuhatsheroko|kuhatsheroko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuhatsheroko|thuhatsheroko]] || [[word:juhatsheroko|juhatsheroko]] || [[word:shuhatsheroko|shuhatsheroko]] || [[word:kuhatsheroko|kuhatsheroko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thehatsheroko|thehatsheroko]] || [[word:jehatsheroko|jehatsheroko]] || [[word:shehatsheroko|shehatsheroko]] || [[word:kehatsheroko|kehatsheroko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothohatsheroko|thothohatsheroko]] || [[word:jojohatsheroko|jojohatsheroko]] || [[word:shoshohatsheroko|shoshohatsheroko]] || [[word:kokohatsheroko|kokohatsheroko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thohatsheroko|thohatsheroko]] || [[word:johatsheroko|johatsheroko]] || [[word:shohatsheroko|shohatsheroko]] || [[word:kohatsheroko|kohatsheroko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thohatsheroko|thohatsheroko]] || [[word:johatsheroko|johatsheroko]] || [[word:shohatsheroko|shohatsheroko]] || [[word:kohatsheroko|kohatsheroko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙hatsheroko|th忙hatsheroko]] || [[word:j忙hatsheroko|j忙hatsheroko]] || [[word:sh忙hatsheroko|sh忙hatsheroko]] || [[word:k忙hatsheroko|k忙hatsheroko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathahatsheroko|thathahatsheroko]] || [[word:jajahatsheroko|jajahatsheroko]] || [[word:shashahatsheroko|shashahatsheroko]] || [[word:kakahatsheroko|kakahatsheroko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thahatsheroko|thahatsheroko]] || [[word:jahatsheroko|jahatsheroko]] || [[word:shahatsheroko|shahatsheroko]] || [[word:kahatsheroko|kahatsheroko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thahatsheroko|thahatsheroko]] || [[word:jahatsheroko|jahatsheroko]] || [[word:shahatsheroko|shahatsheroko]] || [[word:kahatsheroko|kahatsheroko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
